posts.angle: payment rails are improving but card access still blocks teams
posts.copy: Cross-border payments are getting faster. New protocols support the future of agentic payments, but teams still need a card layer to fund global tools today. RichXPay bridges USDT to virtual cards.
sourceTitles: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.
posts.landingSummary: Virtual card for global payments, USDT/USDC top-up, Apple Pay and subscription use cases.
